Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-20 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
LINC is the top-ranked stock today with a dominant score of 95.3, showing exceptional long-term momentum across all timeframes—it's up 1,285% over 10 years and continues crushing SPY by 1,063 percentage points over that same period, while maintaining a clean momentum signal with all four moving average tests passing. CF ranks second but shows notably weaker relative performance, with only 260% returns over 10 years and actually underperforming QQQ by 191 percentage points in the 10-year comparison, suggesting its strength is concentrated in shorter-term windows like the past month (29% gain). The key difference is that LINC displays consistent acceleration across all ratio periods with a "strong_buy" flag and confirmed volatility, while CF shows deceleration in its 6-month to 1-year ratio (0.84) and lags major benchmarks over longer horizons. LINC's correlation to materials (XLB at 0.32) suggests it's capturing a sector-driven uptrend, whereas CF's underperformance against tech indices hints at broader rotation away from traditional sectors. Overall, today's data highlights LINC as a significantly stronger long-term momentum candidate compared to the second-ranked pick.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
